name: Polish Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the sausage for 15 minutes; transfer to a casserole dish.
2. Add oil from the sausage drippings and brown the beef in the oil for another 15 minutes; transfer to the casserole dish.
3. Sauté onions until softened.
4. Add the sautéed onions to the casserole dish.
5. Sauté mushrooms with sauerkraut and white wine.
6. Stir in tomato sauce, soy sauce, caraway seeds, and vegetable seasoning.
7. Combine this mixture with the casserole dish.
8. Cover and bake at 375°F for 2 to 2½ hours, stirring every 30 minutes.
